untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 52-week (yearly) high/low price positions and throwback/pullback detection within 2 weeks. The allowed indicators lack explicit yearly range tracking and historical lookback beyond prev_* fields. price_pos_20 only provides 20-bar position; yearly highs/lows and multi-week throwback logic cannot be accurately expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated yearly position using price_pos_20: upward breakout near yearly high mapped to price_pos_20 >= 0.8, downward breakout in middle of range mapped to 0.4-0.6 range. Volume increase assumed for breakout confirmation. Exit condition uses reversal logic (price returning near breakout price) rather than explicit 2-week throwback detection. Author-silent stop loss and profit targets set to null.
